channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9777] replay-single test_70f: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/a9e1439e-689b-11e7-9230-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_70f failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Please provide additional information about the failure here.

Info required for matching: replay-single 70f
item.summary: replay-single test_70f: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
another one on 2.10.1 https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/4e4e2c74-9b4d-11e7-ba27-5254006e85c2
client console
